prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AO20LWRDS-STD Product Type: CARRIER_BAG_CASE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 20L Water Resistant Dry Sack Description: Keep your gear dry with the ASR Outdoor 20L Dry Sack.

This Dry Sack is a great way to haul your gear while camping, kayaking, hiking, boating or rafting. Each sack will hold up to 20L and has a 9" diameter.

The two-tone body is constructed of 500D/PVC Tarpaulin, making it extremely durable and water resistant. It comes with a sturdy buckle to keep your gear safely sealed inside.

Don't go on your next outdoor adventure without one of these. Search Terms: waterproof gear bag keep items dry out of water camping gear accessories backpack storage bag gift outdoors camping nessecity river boat kayaking safety stow bag Features: - Capacity: 20L; Height: 24"; Diameter: 9" - 2 Tone Body w/ Transparent Top Half - 500D/PVC Tarpaulin Material; Water Resistant - Sturdy Buckle to Keep Gear Sealed === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 20L Water Resistant Dry Sack

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 20L Water Resistant Dry Sack

anthropic.title_differentiation: 500D PVC Tarpaulin, Waterproof, 9 Inch Diameter, Sturdy Buckle Seal, Camping Kayaking Hiking Boating Gear Storage

openai.title_differentiation: 500D PVC Tarpaulin, Transparent Top Half, Sturdy Buckle Closure, 20L Capacity, 24" Tall, 9" Diameter, Lightweight
